ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the athlete (M/F) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "height_cm" REAL /* Height of the athlete in centimeters */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the athlete */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the athlete */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., national, international) */,
  "competition_format" TEXT /* Format of the competition (e.g., single-ply, multi-ply) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weight_classes" (
  "weight_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight class */,
  "weight_class_kg" REAL /* Weight class in kilograms */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the weight class (M/F) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the weight class (e.g., junior, senior) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division (e.g., Juniors, Masters 2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment category */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment category (e.g., Raw, Equipped) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition result */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "weight_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weight class */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment category */,
  "best_squat_kg" REAL /* Best squat result in kilograms */,
  "best_bench_kg" REAL /* Best bench result in kilograms */,
  "best_deadlift_kg" REAL /* Best deadlift result in kilograms */,
  "total_kg" REAL /* Total result in kilograms */,
  "place" TEXT /* Place achieved in the competition */,
  " lift_order" INTEGER /* Order of the lifts */,
  "lot_number" INTEGER /* Lot number of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_weight_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("weight_class_id") REFERENCES weight_classes ("weight_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event registration */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "weight_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weight class */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment category */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_registrations_weight_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("weight_class_id") REFERENCES weight_classes ("weight_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_registrations_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_registrations_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_registrations_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the judge */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the judge */,
  "certification_level" TEXT /* Certification level of the judge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_judges" (
  "event_judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event judge assignment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_judges_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_judges_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., athlete, event organizer, judge, admin) */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete (if the user is an athlete) */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge (if the user is a judge) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_logins" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user login */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of login */,
  "logout_date" TEXT /* Date and time of logout */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_logins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the progress entry */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "body_fat_percentage" REAL /* Body fat percentage of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_progress_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
